items.title: Chinese AI Models Find a Way Forward Through Multi-Model Routing and Cost-Effective Architectures
items.summary: Chinese domestic large language models are finding their path to commercial relevance through multi-model dynamic routing (Fusion) and hybrid agent architectures that prioritize cost efficiency over raw benchmark performance.
